channel.title: Tools on MIT OpenCourseWare
channel.description: Recent content in Tools on MIT OpenCourseWare

item.title: 6.004 standard cell library
item.description: Supporting file for lab assignments on computation structures.
Compressed tar archive of all the supporting files for a course on computation structures.

item.title: 8 clocks
item.description: Supporting file for lab assignments on computation structures.

item.title: Ant
item.description: Ant demo for a lecture on storage elements and synchronous finite state machines.

item.title: BETA Macro package
item.description: Supporting file for lab assignments on computation structures.

item.title: BSim
item.description: Supporting file for lab assignments on computation structures. Latest release of BSim (1.1.11).

item.title: JSim
item.description: Supporting file for lab assignments on computation structures. Latest release of JSim (2.0.28).

item.title: Lab #1: Checkoff
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment to use a simulation program (JSim) to make some measurements of an N-channel mosfet (or “nfet” for short). Information on how to contact the on-line assignments server.

item.title: Lab #2: Checkoff
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment to design and test a CMOS circuit that performs addition on two unsigned 4-bit numbers, producing a 5-bit result. Information on how to contact the on-line assignments server.

item.title: Lab #3: Adder
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment to build the arithmetic and logic unit (ALU) for the Beta processor.

item.title: Lab #3: Boolean
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment to build the arithmetic and logic unit (ALU) for the Beta processor.

item.title: Lab #3: Checkoff 10
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment to build the arithmetic and logic unit (ALU) for the Beta processor. Information on how to contact the on-line assignments server.

item.title: Lab #3: Checkoff 6
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment to build the arithmetic and logic unit (ALU) for the Beta processor. information on how to contact the on-line assignments server.

item.title: Lab #3: compare
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment to build the arithmetic and logic unit (ALU) for the Beta processor.

item.title: Lab #3: Multiply
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment to build the arithmetic and logic unit (ALU) for the Beta processor. These are some test vectors that may be helpful in debugging multipliers.

item.title: Lab #3: Shifter
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment to build the arithmetic and logic unit (ALU) for the Beta processor.

item.title: Lab #4: Header
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment to write the FSM controller for a Turing Machine (TM) which checks to see if the string of left and right parentheses it finds on its input tape “balance.”

item.title: Lab #5: Checkoff
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment to write a Beta assembly language program. Beta environment for assembling compiled C programs

item.title: Lab #6
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment on RISC processor design. This code makes the following assumptions about the Beta design: after reset, the Beta starts executing at location 0; illegal instructions cause a trap to location 4; interrupts cause a trap to location 8.

item.title: Lab #6: Basic Block
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment on RISC processor design.

item.title: Lab #6: Basic Block
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment on RISC processor design.

item.title: Lab #6: Checkoff
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment on RISC processor design. Information on how to contact the on-line assignments server.

item.title: Lab #6: Control
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment on RISC processor design.

item.title: Lab #6: PC
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment on RISC processor design. Tests vectors for debugging Beta PC circuitry.

item.title: Lab #6: Reg File
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment on RISC processor design. Test vectors for debugging Beta register file circuitry.

item.title: Lab #7: Checkoff
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment on trap handlers

item.title: Lab #7: Macros
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment on trap handlers. These macros save and restore all 32 registers in a 32-word block of memory.

item.title: Lab #7: Swap Regs
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment on trap handlers. Handler for opcode 1 extension.

item.title: Lab #8: Simple OS demo for 6.004 Beta processor
item.description: Supporting file for a lab assignment on implementing an operating system. This program implements a primitive OS kernel for the Beta along with three simple user-mode processes hooked together through a semaphore-controlled bounded buffer.

item.title: Nominal Device Models
item.description: Supporting file for lab assignments on computation structures.

item.title: Project Checkoff
item.description: Supporting file for a design project on computation structures.

item.title: Project Checkoff
item.description: Supporting file for a design project on computation structures.

item.title: Project Checkoff
item.description: Supporting file for a design project on computation structures.

item.title: Syntax table for use in JSim-mode buffers
item.description: Supporting file for lab assignments on computation structures. Major Emacs mode for editing JSim netlists

item.title: TMSim
item.description: Supporting file for lab assignments on computation structures. Latest release of TMSim (1.1.8)

item.title: Tools
item.description:
FILES DESCRIPTIONS
6004.tgz (TGZ) Compressed tar archive of all 6.004 files

jsim.jar (JAR)

nominal.jsim (JSIM)

8clocks.jsim (JSIM)

stdcell.jsim (JSIM)

 Latest release of JSim (2.0.28) and include files

bsim.jar (JAR)

beta.uasm (UASM)

 Latest release of BSim (1.1.11) and include files
tmsim.jar (JAR) Latest release of TMSim (1.1.8)
lab1checkoff.jsim (JSIM) Checkoff file for Lab 1
lab2checkoff.jsim (JSIM) Checkoff file for Lab 2

lab3checkoff_6.jsim (JSIM)

lab3checkoff_10.jsim (JSIM)

lab3adder.jsim (JSIM)

lab3boolean.jsim (JSIM)
